questions.clue: This ancient wonder, a massive lighthouse, stood on the island of Pharos near Alexandria, Egypt.
Napoleon Bonaparte was exiled to this remote South Atlantic island after his final defeat at Waterloo in 1815.
The 1648 Peace of Westphalia brought an end to this devastating conflict that ravaged Central Europe for three decades.
choices: The War of the Spanish Succession

questions.clue: This Ottoman sultan, called 'the Magnificent' in the West, ruled the empire at its greatest territorial extent in the 16th century.
The 1896 Battle of Adwa saw this African nation decisively defeat Italian colonial forces and preserve its independence.
This gas makes up approximately 78% of Earth's atmosphere by volume.
Mitochondria are called the 'powerhouse of the cell' because they produce this primary energy-carrying molecule.
This layer of Earth's atmosphere contains the ozone layer that shields life from harmful ultraviolet radiation.
The Coriolis effect causes hurricanes in the Northern Hemisphere to rotate in this direction.
With atomic number 43, this element was the first to be artificially produced in a laboratory, achieved in 1937.
This 2023 Greta Gerwig film starring Margot Robbie became one of the highest-grossing movies in history.
choices: Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny

questions.clue: Taylor Swift's 2023 Eras Tour opened each show with songs from this album era.
This 2021 Korean survival drama became Netflix's most-watched series of all time upon its debut.
Kendrick Lamar headlined the halftime show at Super Bowl LIX, held in this city in February 2025.
Britpop legends Oasis reunited for a massive 2025 world tour with this Gallagher brother as lead vocalist.

dailyDouble.clue: This Mongol ruler founded the largest contiguous land empire in history during the 13th century.
